raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The artifact culminates in an explicit contribution claim ('first field-validated hybrid local/central V2G dispatch architecture'); assessing whether the stated gap, experimental setup, and claim are internally coherent is central to any plausible reading of 'take a look' on a technical write-up.","R1.3":"Four concrete quantitative outcomes are asserted (18.4% peak reduction, 71% regulation-revenue capture, 1.2% SoC-at-departure violation rate, 63% backhaul reduction); verifying that these claims are traceable to and consistent with the described experimental apparatus and baselines is a load-bearing part of reviewing this text.","R1.6":"'Take a look at this paragraph' is the canonical informal request for writing-quality feedback; prose clarity, sentence-level precision, and paragraph flow are therefore centrally in scope alongside the technical reading."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Is your primary goal feedback on writing quality and clarity (prose, flow, sentence structure), or on the scientific and technical content (evidence-claim alignment, methodology soundness, contribution validity)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The artifact culminates in an explicit contribution claim ('first field-validated hybrid local/central V2G dispatch architecture'); assessing whether the stated gap, experimental setup, and claim are internally coherent is central to any plausible reading of 'take a look' on a technical write-up.
rationale.R1.3: Four concrete quantitative outcomes are asserted (18.4% peak reduction, 71% regulation-revenue capture, 1.2% SoC-at-departure violation rate, 63% backhaul reduction); verifying that these claims are traceable to and consistent with the described experimental apparatus and baselines is a load-bearing part of reviewing this text.
rationale.R1.6: 'Take a look at this paragraph' is the canonical informal request for writing-quality feedback; prose clarity, sentence-level precision, and paragraph flow are therefore centrally in scope alongside the technical reading.

parsed.clarification_question: Is your primary goal feedback on writing quality and clarity (prose, flow, sentence structure), or on the scientific and technical content (evidence-claim alignment, methodology soundness, contribution validity)?
